items.title: Seattle Tech Workers Are Fueling a Real-Estate Rush in the Cascade Mountains
items.description: Workers from Amazon and Microsoft are spending big on homes in Suncadia, an all-season resort in Cle Elum.

items.title: Trump Hosts Corporate Ballroom Donors at Glitzy White House Dinner
items.description: Trump Hosts Corporate Ballroom Donors at Glitzy White House Dinner

items.title: Wall Street Is Heating Up on This ‘Strong Buy’ Chip Stock
items.description: After a sluggish start to the year, this ‘Strong Buy’ chip stock is back in the spotlight as bullish analyst upgrades spark renewed investor excitement.

items.title: Eric Naaman of Damotech Wins EY 2025 Entrepreneur Of The Year® Eastern Overall Award
items.description: MONTREAL, October 15, 2025--Damotech proudly celebrates CEO Eric Naaman's nomination as EY Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 Eastern Overall Award winner. The EY Canada program honours visionary leaders whose purpose-driven innovations transform industries, create jobs, and strengthen communities.

items.title: ‘The Smartest Investments We Can Possibly Imagine’: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Says OpenAI Will Be Worth Trillions, Rivaling Amazon and Meta
items.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s remarks on OpenAI underscore his belief in the company’s trillion-dollar potential and the strategic value of investing in known technologies.
